nodes.label: Home Screen — Inactive State with Routines Panel
nodes.description: Home screen in inactive/Inactivo state. Shows habit grid (Estudiar, Respirar, Gratitud, Entrenar, Journaling, Visualizar, Caminar, Suplementos) in dark card tiles. Below: 'Recordatorios' section with 3 activos — Meditar 5min (checked/completed, 07:30 Diario), Hidratarse (Diario), Cierre del día (Diario), Llamar a mamá. '+ Agregar recordatorio' CTA at bottom. A yellow warning banner reads 'FALTA UN PASO — Elige un tiempo de enfoque'. Mentex Tweaks panel visible in dev overlay showing Estado=Inactivo selected, card style=Glass, typography=Inter.

nodes.label: Habit Grid — 8 Habits in 2-column Layout
nodes.description: 2-column grid of habit cards visible in inactive state: Estudiar (45 min), Respirar (9 min), Gratitud (3 veces), Entrenar (30 min), Journaling (15 min), Visualizar (5 min), Caminar (3 km), Suplementos (Hecho). Each card has icon + label + duration/count. Dark pill/rounded card style.

nodes.label: Recordatorios Section — 4 Items, 1 Completed
nodes.description: Reminders section labeled 'Recordatorios / 3 activos'. Items: Meditar 5min (checkmark completed, 07:30 Diario), Hidratarse (Diario), Cierre del día (22:00 Diario), Llamar a mamá (no time). Each row has dismiss X. '+ Agregar recordatorio' link at bottom.

nodes.label: Focus Time Warning Banner — 'Falta un Paso'
nodes.description: Yellow/amber full-width banner at bottom of inactive home: icon, 'FALTA UN PASO' label, 'Elige un tiempo de enfoque' title, 'Es lo único que falta para activar tu sesión.' subtitle, arrow CTA. Gate preventing session activation until focus duration is selected.

nodes.label: Mentex Tweaks Dev Overlay Panel
nodes.description: Developer overlay panel (Mentex Tweaks) visible in screenshots. Sections: AUTH (DEV) with route buttons, ESTADO toggle (Inactivo/Activo), ACENTO color picker (teal/principal), ESTILO DE CARDS (Glass/Líneas/Plano), TIPOGRAFÍA familia (Geist/Inter/Manrope). Currently: Estado=Inactivo, Card style=Glass, Font=Inter.

nodes.label: Bottom Tab Bar — 5 Tabs
nodes.description: Bottom navigation bar with 5 tabs: Home (house icon, active), Explorar (compass), IA (brain/AI), Comunidad (people), Perfil (person). Present across all home screen states.

nodes.label: Card Style: Glass — Design Token
nodes.description: Mentex Tweaks panel shows card style options: Glass (selected by default in these screenshots), Líneas, Plano. Glass style renders dark semi-transparent cards with rounded corners. This is the primary card style visible in all home screen states.

nodes.label: Typography: Inter — Active Font Family
nodes.description: Mentex Tweaks panel shows typography options: Geist, Inter (selected), Manrope. Inter is the active font family across these home screen screenshots.
